tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"if command -v hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo \"HPING_PATH=$(command -v hping3)\"; else echo \"HPING_NOT_FOUND\"; fi"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
if command -v hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echoo "HPING_PATH=$(command -v hping3)"; else echo "HPING_NOT_FOUND"; fi
HPING_PATH=/usr/sbin/hping3
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"if [ -f /usr/sbin/hping3 ]; then mv /usr/sbin/hping3 /usr/sbin/hping3.disabled && echo 'MOVED'; else echo 'NOT_FOUND'; fi"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
if [ -f /usr/sbin/hping3 ]; then mv /usr/sbin/hhping3 /usr/sbin/hping3.disabled && echo 'MOVED'; else echo 'NOT_FOUND'; fi
MOVED
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"command -v hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo \"FOUND: $(command -v hping3)\" || echo \"NOTFOUND\"; ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3* 2>/dev/null || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
command -v hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "FOUNND: $(command -v hping3)" || echo "NOTFOUND"; ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3* 2>/dev/nulll || true
NOTFOUND
